author: anon-ab6221f8
content: Plan: (1) Add .gitignore to hub cache with .hub-write-lock entry during init_cache(). (2) Add ensure_hub_gitignore() helper that existing caches can call to self-heal. (3) Call it from init_cache for new branches and from clean_dirty_state/fetch for existing ones. (4) Untrack the file if already tracked via git rm --cached.
